narrative:
Westerville 2-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,210 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.8 percentage points.
